human_readable_diff:
[✗ BREAKING] REMOVE_FIELD — field: source_hash.existence
  action: Two-sprint deprecation minimum. Each registry subscriber must acknowledge removal. No silent drops.

[✗ BREAKING] NARROW_TYPE — field: extracted_facts_confidence.type
  before: number
  after:  integer
  action: CRITICAL. Requires migration plan with rollback. Registry blast radius report mandatory. Statistical baseline must be re-established after migration. Example: float 0.0-1.0 -> int 0-100 is a CRITICAL narrowing change.

[✓ COMPATIBLE] CHANGE_RANGE_WIDENING — field: extracted_facts_confidence.range
  before: [0.0, 1.0]
  after:  [0, 100]
  action: Re-run statistical checks. Consumers accepting wider range are unaffected.

old_value.description: SHA-256 of the source file. Changes iff source content changes.

migration_checklist.action: CRITICAL. Requires migration plan with rollback. Registry blast radius report mandatory. Statistical baseline must be re-established after migration. Example: float 0.0-1.0 -> int 0-100 is a CRITICAL narrowing change.
Two-sprint deprecation minimum. Each registry subscriber must acknowledge removal. No silent drops.
Notify week4-cartographer (week4-team@org.com) of breaking changes. Confirm fields_consumed: ['doc_id', 'extracted_facts', 'extraction_model', 'entities'].
Notify week7-ai-contract-extensions (week7-team@org.com) of breaking changes. Confirm fields_consumed: ['extracted_facts', 'doc_id'].
Re-run ContractGenerator to update schema snapshots after migration.
Re-run ValidationRunner on all affected contracts to confirm 0 FAIL results.

steps.action: Revert producer code changes that caused: ['source_hash', 'extracted_facts_confidence']
Re-deploy producer from last known good commit. Reference snapshot: schema_snapshots\week3-document-refinery-extractions\20260404_150758.yaml
Re-run ValidationRunner to confirm all checks PASS.
Re-establish statistical baselines in schema_snapshots/baselines.json if the rollback changes numeric distributions.

rollback_plan.estimated_recovery_time: 1-2 hours for code rollback + 30 min validation
